title: johrenia longifolia
intro: Johrenia longifolia, also known as African thorny pea, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Johrenia longifolia include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Johrenia longifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken orally.
